speaker: MATT
raw_text: Oh my god. On sale now we do have our very first live show in New York City. It's coming up pretty soon, actually, in two weeks. We'll be at the United Palace in Washington Heights, Thursday, October 4th for the live show. Tickets are still available now at Ticketmaster. You can check out all the details to do so at critrole.com.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They didn't put any fucking effects on. I mean, we had it all mapped out. It was going to be amazing, and now it's just--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's really lame.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's pretty lame, and also kind of insulting to Matt. I mean, if you want to be honest about it. Sorry to the audience, and sorry to D&D Beyond. Back to you, Matt!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Thank you, Sam.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yet more evidence why we should see the return of Max "Better Sam" James.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. One of these days, your escalation is going to be the end of us all. Not looking forward to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Guys, for D&D Beyond, I brought a loaded gun!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of these days.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Guys, it's really amazing!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Oh wait, no, let me see, I think he might be immune to it for the next 24 hours based on the ability.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do actually, thank you. How many points?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Thanks Mr. Clay and Jester.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're welcome.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the wave of healing divine energy emanates from Clay's focused point, Algar who's still being held against the wall by Beau, (gasping)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll bring the tip of the falchion right under his chin. You know, before we begin, we got this thing about calling out, yelling, really sensitive eardrums, so let's not do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Also, before we begin, I want to make sure that you know how serious we are in getting honesty from you. I take his head and I go whack-whack into the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Back unconscious!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to do Extort Truth on him, spend a ki point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He has to make a charisma saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 14 is the DC.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so he succeeds.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fucking fuck!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can try it again if you have another ki point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Well, I'm going to double check here, but I think if he succeeds in the save he's immune to it for 24 hours. I could be wrong. Let me double check here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Also, before we begin, I want to make sure that you know how serious we are in getting honesty from you. I take his head and I go whack-whack into the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Back unconscious!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to do Extort Truth on him, spend a ki point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He has to make a charisma saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is 14.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: 14 is the DC.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so he succeeds.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fucking fuck!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can try it again if you have another ki point.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I do.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh wait, no, let me see, I think he might be immune to it for the next 24 hours based on the ability.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What, to mine?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If he succeeds on it, yeah. I think so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well then, I go  I don't think you heard me. Whack-whack, and I'll try one more time.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "I report to the Clovis Concord. I was assigned here maybe a few months back from Port Zoon, but I largely, specifically, report to the Marquis and his associates."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I have to roll for each one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, you're fine. To Extort Truth, no, you can continue to try it if you want to.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I try it again.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Spam it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Whack, whack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. With every more button pulled (smack) Button. (smack) Button. You're teaming up on this regard.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Real serious.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that's a failure. That's a natural ten. Okay, you slam his head two more times and pinch an area underneath the bottom of the jaw. It causes his irises to swell for a little bit. He looks towards you, head lolling a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Now, you're going to answer all these nice man's questions, okay?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He doesn't answer, but you have his attention.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What was your job down here, and why were you giving commands to that creature with this bracelet?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "It's my job. I was assigned as the supervisor of the Sluice Gate."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Who do you report to?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: He sits there, held to the wall, being chewed on by a tiny octopus, for the next 30 minutes, while you roll-- Okay, roll for your disguise kit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I have a cloak.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, we can wrap him up in a cloak and carry him out like we're carrying some equipment.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I mean, (southern accent) Oh, all right. (whispering) Shit, I forgot to do the voice. How do you remember to do that all the time?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He doesn't, sometimes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Algar, you're going to be very helpful when it comes to making sure Algar knows who to talk to and the right things to say to get us out, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Right."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I'm sorry, Jorge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Jorge." He's still trying to pull away from the horrible, slow sucking of--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, it's a beak.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, the tentacles wrapping around the neck, and there's a slight biting right there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to pull out my disguise kit and give him a nice little beard and a mustache. And an eye patch.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Adella leaves in little under a week. You can secure passage today on a small ship that's heading back to Marquet. You send him off on his way. You wait another hour or so to make sure the ship disembarks and he doesn't abscond from the ship itself. You watch as it begins to make its way towards the horizon and you feel confident that he's not going to be coming back anytime soon.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Because it's a longer journey, it's a little more expensive, but you can secure passage for him to Marquet for, we'll say, 20 gold.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'll sponsor that journey.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Want to give him a little spending cash? Make sure he's not completely destitute when he gets there.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That seems nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Did we take the money that was on him?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I may have taken the money that was on him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You want to put back one of those platinums?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure. Here you go, Jorge. Here's one platinum.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "This is very kind of you."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And five copper. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The beard's peeling a little bit. He's just staring at the coin in his palm.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Let me get that part. (slap)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: God, we're mean.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He was a bad person. We didn't kill him.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: No, you let him live. That's really nice.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thanks, Deuce.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We're going to try and take him to Adella or just any boat?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Any boat.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Correct. It doesn't last a long while. A short time passes and it just--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A water creature?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How'd that fire happen, though?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Here's a question. Did you dismiss your specter, or do you have a--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I didn't dismiss it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys are--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's just running around in terror.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you're leaving the area, right behind you is this (ghostly groaning). What do you do with it?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You mean as we go outside outside?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. It's following you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Go back inside the room!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys begin to watch as that same drowned specter is now coming back behind you (groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh god! I Turn Undead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It turns right around and runs off a bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait. Turn Undead really just turns an undead around?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yes. It's Turn Undead.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's frightened of him and runs away.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's like a remote control car that spins.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Unless you're high enough level, and then it (pop).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm not quite at the pop-it. It's too strong for me to pop, right?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: I feel like you were out last time. We'll say you took a short rest, but-- It's wandered back in the chamber and it's looking at Fjord. (groaning)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Unless you're high enough level, and then it (pop).

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm not quite at the pop-it. It's too strong for me to pop, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct. It doesn't last a long while. A short time passes and it just--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So I'm writing this letter? And I'm leaving it in his office, yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah we're still in the office, are we not?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Technically we left. You three are here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: While Jester is writing, I would like to flip this office for anything of value.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You already have.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, just the papers?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, you checked around for anything that would be interesting, so--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Excellent.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Well, I have a thought.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What if he accidentally lost control of the creature and then ran--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (groaning noises)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Ah! Turn Undead. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: How many Channel Divinities can you do?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I might be out. I was about to say-- don't I have-- I might be out.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It looks like the city. I mean, at this point in the day, it's getting a little later. The sky is starting to get a bit-- maybe the oranges of dusk are starting to peek in a little bit. You maybe have another hour or so of daylight.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast Calm Emotions on myself and go swim to the boat.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You go ahead and make your way out, get up on the side of it, and begin to row yourself back to the edge of the dock. There, not far away, is the old fisherman you had spoken to earlier that you had borrowed it from. You gather your things out of it and he comes over and is like, "Well, I appreciate you bringing this back."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's no problem. I think I've had enough ocean for a while. That was--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No such thing. No such thing!'"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Have a good day!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You too, tall one."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What do we do now?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I turn around and I look at the city. Do I notice... commerce? Does it look like things are slowing down?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we now Bane?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, that was a garbage roll. Seven. That's terrible.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right. By the time you make it to the Lavish Chateau, it is sunset. The last bit of light that vanishes over the horizon far over the ocean, the Lucidian Ocean in the distance. You make your way to the interior, where a number of folks have finally gathered. Maybe a handful, six or seven people, are already in there enjoying meals, having drinks. You know that there isn't a performance tonight, but people are in there enjoying the relatively, comparably classy atmosphere, as the familiar band plays their music. What do you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's Yussa Errennis, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yussa Errennis.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hey, Caleb!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You memorized the map of the underground pathways, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do any of them run under this tower?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, there was no marking for a tower.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Using your spatial, Beautiful Mind techniques.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an intelligence check to see if you can overlay the memory of the sketch you saw with the location in the Quay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Just raw intelligence?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yep.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That is a 16.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 16. You feel like you've been able to take the two and map them together pretty well. Nothing passes directly beneath the tower, no. The Sluice isn't a wide network. It's a handful of deliberately placed tunnels to make their way towards specific parts of different districts.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That diagram wasn't elaborate enough for me to know the answer to that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Let's go to the Lavish Chateau?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Mm-hmm.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah, go ahead and take a short rest. You guys manage to enjoy probably one of the better meals you've had in a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Algar, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We went to go talk to him, but he had already left.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "He left?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, he had fled the city, apparently. Things happened, they were real bad or something, I don't know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Huh. Well, that may very well be a great turn of luck in my benefit, definitely. Thank you for looking into that."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course! Yeah, we were going to talk to him and everything, but he is gone, so...

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: " Well... that makes me feel more comfortable, thank you very much."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I appreciate it."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do you guys want to eat anything? (sounds of agreement)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Very well! I will ensure that you are all properly taken care of this night." (clapping twice) She goes ahead and brings the servants back in. A meal is placed for the rest of you, and as the evening progresses, and you take a bit of time to rest--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Like a short rest?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Well, since you've been gone, you know."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Squeaks like a balloon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to pull one of the beetles out of my staff and say, "Professor, you want a snack?" I hold it up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're holding the beetle?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make an animal handling check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh boy, there goes your finger.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Eventually, it dives down, snatches and-- a little prick on the finger from one of the talons-- but, eventually, makes a quick meal and heads back up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What happens if we have to leave and the bird is still here?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You can climb up. Yeah, you're a monk, you can climb up to the ceiling. Hey, Mama?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Will you watch my puppy? Well, it's me and Beau's puppy, really.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Will you watch our puppy while we go out tonight?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course. To be honest, I've been thinking about maybe having a pet, so this will be good training."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, really?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Yeah. There are torch poles set up towards the wharf that are giving a faint bit of light, but other than that, it's not a full moon, but it's mostly full and there's quite a bit of moonlight coming down over the dock. You can see it glittering across the water in the center of the harbor. There are a number of ships quietly set out in that vicinity. The star-clustered sky completely envelopes the air above you. It's a beautiful view. The closer you get to the docks, you can hear the sound of waves crashing from out of view, the creaking of wet wood filling the air as the docks shift and the number of boats that are currently moored to the center of the harbor creak from side to side as the water comes in. Every now and then, you see the slow glowing beam of the Lighthouse pass overhead about once a minute or so. It's a very slow moving, pulsing rhythm. Now ships of varying sizes sit across the dock spread, tied to their various posts, all seemingly lightless and lifeless in their slumber. There's no one doing any sort of evening work on these ships at this hour. You see a handful of zolezzo patrolling up and down the sides of the dock doing their rounds, no urgency or direction necessarily. Make a perception check, if you don't mind, Clay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're fucking Hermione Granger up in this shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: She had a cat.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I put my hood up. I take the mask off, but I put my hood up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You guys make your way through the streets heading towards where?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You know. The docks.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, well, there's the Restless Wharf and there's the Open Quay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We were told maybe one of those?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The place that you had heard this information--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Did Orly say specific docks?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It was the Open Quay right? Was where he wanders at midnight?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We were at the Wayfarer's Cove. Which is in the Restless Wharf.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You didn't get any specifics, he just said near the docks, but you were in the Restless Wharf when you got this information.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. Who's helming a lookout?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'll do that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I put up my hood as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
